aljazeera.title: Trump criticises NATO allies over Iran conflict support

monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Major Airstrikes on Iran Over Hormuz Ceasefire Violation
US Strikes in Iran Four to Five Times Larger Than Previous Attacks
— S3 · Conflict · Iran · 7m ago. A US official tells Axios the current strikes on Iran are four to five times larger in scope and power than strikes 10 days ago.
Araghchi Harassed at Khamenei Funeral in Tehran

— S3 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 14m ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi was harassed by regime supporters chanting 'shame' and 'death to the traitor' during the funeral procession of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.
US Official Expects Strikes on Iran to Continue
